title: DL10 5LB, Holmedale Valley Limited: partial surrender issued - EPR/WP3833NW/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:    Operator name: Holmedale Valley Limited   Installation name: Pond Dale Farm   Permit number: EPR/WP3833NW/S004   "
